cit.basis: 2025 consolidation package amending the Income Tax Act (Act No. 595/2003 Coll.): 10% for taxable revenue up to EUR 100,000; 21% standard; 24% on a tax base exceeding EUR 5,000,000.
cit.pillar_two_note: Slovakia implemented the EU Pillar Two global minimum tax (Directive (EU) 2022/2523) via Act No. 507/2023 Coll.; in-scope groups (revenue >= EUR 750m) face a 15% minimum effective rate via a qualified domestic top-up tax.

financial_transaction_tax.note: The 2025 consolidation package introduced a financial transaction tax (Act No. 279/2024 Coll.) on debit transactions of businesses, effective in 2025 (charged from 1 April 2025); out of scope for this CIT estimator.

vat.note: Standard VAT rate raised from 20% to 23% on 1 January 2025 under the consolidation package; reduced rates restructured to 19% and 5%.

official_sources.name: Finančná správa Slovenskej republiky (Financial Administration of the Slovak Republic)

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
The 10%/21%/24% band is selected via company_size; the estimator does not itself split a tax base across bands.
Financial transaction tax, minimum tax (tax licence), WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
